description: Mexican criminal organization formerly the enforcer gang of the Beltrán Leyva Cartel, operating independently since 2017 under Fausto Isidro Meza Flores. Based in Guasave, Sinaloa, it engages in drug trafficking, murder, kidnapping, and extortion. The group is in a turf war with the Sinaloa Cartel and active in Sinaloa, Sonora, Durango, and Nayarit.
